metadata.description: Collaborative Intelligence Extensions - Cognitive extensions that enhance human capability, not replace it.

plugins.name: guild-arch
plugins.description: Multi-perspective architecture review plus trust-boundaries security reasoning (SBD principles tagged forcing/posture, lethal trifecta, pit-of-success primitives, Semgrep/Gitleaks/zizmor scanning). Get deliberate pushback on design and security decisions before they become expensive.

plugins.name: ci-scaffolds
plugins.description: Collaboration scaffolds and teaching-oriented review posture. Verify claims, calibrate trust, stay in the driver's seat, write security findings that actually land (via the mudge agent). Composes with guild-arch/trust-boundaries for the security-reasoning half.

plugins.name: craft-research
plugins.description: Deep research and literature synthesis. Analyze papers, ground claims in evidence, build citation-accurate knowledge.

plugins.name: craft-rhetoric
plugins.description: Write content that lands — docs, presentations, tutorials, research papers. Sharpens your thinking while handling the delivery craft.

plugins.name: craft-extensions
plugins.description: Build Claude Code extensions and developer tools — skills, agents, hooks, commands, MCP servers, and the data layers behind them.

plugins.name: craft-evals
plugins.description: Write evals that measure what matters — for agents, skills, MCP servers, and prompts.

plugins.name: antifragile
plugins.description: Diagnose endogenous fragility in platform systems and apply the ACES (Adaptable, Composable, Extensible Software) inversion. Prescriptive framework for the Stasis/Drag/Opacity cycle.

plugins.name: recon
plugins.description: Mechanical collection system. Config-driven data collection from HTTP APIs, CLI tools, and local repositories into queryable JSONL.

plugins.name: radix
plugins.description: Mine tacit knowledge from code and code-adjacent artifacts (git history, doc comments, RFCs, PRs, issues, discussions). Multi-session workflow producing typed JSONL corpus that captures WHY-layer expert knowledge public datasets miss. Eight mining modes across two phases — extraction (oscillations, scars, signatures, schemas) and synthesis (models, tradeoffs, antipatterns, aesthetics). Works on a single codebase, a curated collection, or a domain (with elite-repo identification). Tooling guidance for git, rg, gh, ast-grep, code-maat. Multi-session continuity via STATUS.md and session_log.jsonl.
